name: City of Graves
short_description: As a soldier in a lifeless city after a disease outbreak, fight creatures and hunt for what will save the city.
detailed_description:
The silent screams of the dead and the terrible secrets lurking behind the tombstones...

"City of Graves" invites you into an unforgettable nightmare in a city haunted by death and darkness. Players will experience the moments of horror that await them around every corner in a graveyard city shrouded in shadows. As a soldier in this city, your mission is to fight against formidable monsters in order to obtain the antibody that will save the city.

"City of Graves" is developed with the Unreal Engine and will immerse players with its realistic graphics and in-depth atmosphere.

"City of Graves" offers players an unforgettable horror adventure and impressive gameplay dynamics.
But remember that in this graveyard city, every move can have deadly consequences.

Are you ready? "City of Graves" will lead you through mysterious tombstones, let you get lost in the darkness and invite you to an unforgettable horror adventure.
Remember that the dead living in this city can't wait to eat you.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Turkish
